since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.33%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC +1.25% · Gold -0.20% · Nasdaq100 +0.09%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.33%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.33%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +17.03%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +17.03%, META +5.96%, NVDA +3.18%, UEC +2.71%, AMAT +2.05%. Laggards: RXRX -7.05%, MDB -5.59%, S -5.33%, CRWD -5.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.16% at $148.87
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
